patches.summary: Adds local Suno workflow and analytics commands beyond the sniffed endpoint spec.
patches.reason: These commands compose reverse-engineered API calls with the generic local SQLite resource store for recipes, spend analysis, lineage, budget caps, sessions, variant picking, evolution, and export bundles.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./..., and help checks for new command paths pass.

patches.summary: Greptile PR #577 review fixes: bump --wait poll cap to 5min, parameterize cookie SQL query, add CDN download timeout, wire persisted budget cap into generate, push budget spend filter into SQL.
patches.reason: Greptile flagged 4 issues across two review rounds (2 P1 + 2 P2 round 1; 1 P1 + 1 P2 round 2 after fixes pushed). Round 1: waitForGenerateVariants capped polling at 60s but Suno generations routinely take 90-180s; countCookiesForDomain interpolated domainPattern into a sqlite3 subprocess query (latent SQL injection; no reachable callsite today); downloadOrPlaceholder used bare http.Get with no timeout. Round 2: budget set daily/monthly stored a cap but generate never read it; estimatedSpendSince did a full table scan + JSON parse on every check. cli-skills/pp-suno/SKILL.md was initially removed per AGENTS.md but restored after verify-skills.yml CI required the mirror to be present (filed as Printing Press AGENTS/CI alignment issue).
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass; PATCH markers anchor each change.
patches.upstream_issue: https://github.com/mvanhorn/cli-printing-press/issues/1418 covers the upstream browser-sniff body-shape inference class; the four local code fixes are CLI-specific defenses.
